subcodes.first_line: O ye two exalted branches of the blessed Tree! Your letter hath reached us, and its contents testify to the firmness and steadfastness of the beloved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو فرع رفیع دوحه مبارکه نامه شما رسید و معانیش دلالت بر ثبوت و رسوخ احبای
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @business; financial; property matters
